scope: Compact source-backed index of MoonCat-related IPFS CIDs and artifact folders directly observed in reviewed MoonCatRescue source pages.

provenance.notes: Entries are limited to CIDs directly observed on the official MoonCatRescue Build and Contribute pages. This file records source-backed CID/artifact descriptions only; it does not fetch, validate, pin, hash-check, or import payload contents.

cids.contains: Original JavaScript implementation used for converting MoonCat hexadecimal IDs into traits/visualization, according to the reviewed MoonCatRescue pages.
sourceEvidence: Build with MoonCats links MoonCatRescue JavaScript Parser to ipfs://bafybeifl4bvfa5qv3s4peni6fwdyggdfbcykm2xe77z5bfpmureec2x7oq.
Contribute page Skills/IPFS Pinning list labels the same CID as mooncatparser.js.
limitations: Payload bytes were not fetched or hash-validated in this pass.
This entry does not replace parser behavior notes in data/libmooncat-surfaces.json or references/upstream/mooncatrescue/mooncatparser.js.

cids.contains: Folder described as containing one PNG sprite-sheet file for each rescued MoonCat formatted for a walk animation.
sourceEvidence: Contribute page Skills/IPFS Pinning list labels this CID as MoonCat Walk Sprites.
limitations: Folder contents and count were not fetched or validated.
The listed generator repository was not reviewed in this pass.

cids.contains: Folder described as containing one PNG explanatory card for each rescued MoonCat covering five-byte identifier traits.
sourceEvidence: Contribute page Skills/IPFS Pinning list labels this CID as MoonCat Hex Explainers.
limitations: Folder contents and count were not fetched or validated.
This entry does not verify the explanatory trait claims on the cards.

cids.contains: Folder described as containing VOX files for rescued MoonCats in various poses and animation stages.
sourceEvidence: Contribute page Skills/IPFS Pinning list labels this CID as MoonCat 3D Voxel models.
limitations: Folder contents and count were not fetched or validated.
The referenced isotile project context was not reviewed in this pass.

cids.contains: Folder described as containing public metadata for the MoonCat Moments collection.
sourceEvidence: Contribute page Skills/IPFS Pinning list labels this CID as MoonCat Moments public metadata.
limitations: Metadata files were not fetched, counted, or schema-validated.
This entry does not define MoonCat Moments collection metadata fields.

cids.contains: Folder described as JSON metadata for MoonCat Pop derivative art pieces.
sourceEvidence: Contribute page Skills/IPFS Pinning list labels this CID as MoonCat Pop JSON metadata.
limitations: Metadata files were not fetched, counted, or schema-validated.
This entry does not define MoonCat Pop collection metadata fields.

cids.contains: Folder described as still thumbnail imagery for MoonCat Pop derivative art pieces.
sourceEvidence: Contribute page Skills/IPFS Pinning list labels this CID as MoonCat Pop still thumbnails.
limitations: Image files were not fetched, counted, or decoded.
This entry does not validate image dimensions or generated artwork.

cids.contains: Folder described as animated videos for MoonCat Pop derivative art pieces.
sourceEvidence: Contribute page Skills/IPFS Pinning list labels this CID as MoonCat Pop animated videos.
limitations: Video files were not fetched, counted, or decoded.
This entry does not validate codecs, duration, or generated artwork.

checkedSources.result: Found direct ipfs:// link for MoonCatRescue JavaScript Parser and link to the Contribute page IPFS supporting content list.
Found official Skills/IPFS Pinning list with eight CIDs.
No CIDs found; reference snapshot README remains useful for local upstream file boundaries.
No verified CIDs found; these files remain navigation/context sources.

fields.key: Stable local identifier for the CID/artifact record.
fields.uri: ipfs:// URI for the CID when a bare CID is verified.
fields.url: Gateway or artifact URL when directly verified; null when only the bare CID/ipfs URI is recorded.
fields.kind: Compact artifact category such as parser-source-file, metadata-folder, image-folder, video-folder, or voxel-model-folder.
fields.contains: Compact source-backed description of what the CID is said to contain.
fields.sourceRefs: References to data/sources.json entries that support this record.
fields.sourceEvidence: Short evidence notes from the reviewed source surface.
fields.verificationStatus: Source/payload verification boundary for this pass.
fields.canonicality: Whether this is an official project reference, artifact reference, community reference, or other scoped status.
fields.trustLevel: Trust tier inherited from supporting sourceRefs.

limitations: CID payloads were not fetched, decoded, counted, schema-validated, or re-hashed.
Gateway availability and pinning status were not checked.
Only CIDs directly observed in reviewed MoonCatRescue source pages were recorded.
This file does not establish canonical NFT metadata, image, video, parser, or collection behavior beyond the reviewed source descriptions.
No CIDs from community links, marketplace pages, API responses, or contract artifacts were promoted in this pass.
todos: Optionally verify selected CID payload availability with HEAD/range-safe checks in a focused pass without importing payload bodies.
If exact metadata schemas or asset counts are needed, create a separate generated-data method before importing derived summaries.
Review whether contract-recorded parser hash evidence should be cross-linked to this CID entry in a contract-focused pass.
Continue to leave unobserved CIDs unknown rather than guessing from marketplace or gateway URLs.
